scripts.build: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && vite build
scripts.test: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json && node --experimental-strip-types src/lib/severity.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/lib/stats.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/lib/timeAgo.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types src/lib/usgsFeeds.test.ts
